test.command: npm run type-check && npm run build

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen fullstack-worker procedure enforcement so required verification steps (especially `npm run lint` and mandatory `agent-browser` checks for UI features) are explicitly validated before `followedProcedure: true` can be reported.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both reviewed auth-ux features passed code review but missed required skill-procedure evidence: ux-unified-login omitted lint in handoff verification, and ux-onboarding omitted required agent-browser verification for UI changes.

rejectedObservations.observation: Missing required agent-browser verification evidence for ux-onboarding UI work.
